basics.name: Priya Sharma
basics.label: Clinical Research Scientist
basics.summary: PhD-trained clinical researcher specializing in oncology trial design, biomarker validation, and regulatory submission packages. Ten years bridging bench science and phase II/III clinical operations.

work.name: Helix Therapeutics
work.description: Biopharmaceutical company focused on precision oncology
work.summary: Lead scientist for two immuno-oncology trials across EU and North American sites.
highlights: Authored investigator brochures and clinical study reports for EMA and FDA review.
Reduced protocol deviation rate by 31% through centralized monitoring dashboards.
Co-chaired data safety monitoring board preparation for a phase II basket trial.

work.name: National Cancer Research Institute
work.summary: Conducted biomarker discovery studies supporting early-phase trial cohort selection.
highlights: Published findings linking PD-L1 expression patterns to treatment response stratification.
Managed biobank sample logistics for 400+ participant longitudinal study.

volunteer.summary: Delivered hands-on workshops introducing clinical trials to secondary school students.
highlights: Reached 1,200 students across underserved boroughs in Greater London.
Designed a mock trial activity explaining randomization and blinding.

awards.title: Early Career Investigator Award
awards.summary: Recognized for outstanding contribution to biomarker-driven trial design in solid tumours.

publications.name: Predictive Biomarkers in Checkpoint Inhibitor Therapy
publications.summary: Multi-centre retrospective analysis of 890 patients treated with anti-PD-1 agents.

publications.name: Adaptive Trial Designs in Rare Cancers
publications.summary: Framework for Bayesian adaptive enrichment in ultra-rare tumour populations.

projects.name: TrialTrack Open Dashboard
projects.description: Open-source dashboard visualizing enrollment velocity and deviation trends for academic trial sites.
highlights: Adopted by 12 NHS trusts for internal monitoring.
Built with Python, FastAPI, and Plotly.

references.name: Dr. Helen Marsh
references.reference: Priya combines rigorous scientific thinking with pragmatic trial execution. She is the researcher you want leading complex, multi-site oncology studies.
